## IAA Trigger: AGENT_CONTRACT

All tasks qualify as AGENT_CONTRACT modifications:
- `.github/agents/independent-assurance-agent.md` — direct agent contract update
- `.agent-workspace/independent-assurance-agent/knowledge/iaa-high-frequency-checks.md` — T2 knowledge addition (rule A-015: T2 knowledge patches require full ceremony)
- `.agent-workspace/independent-assurance-agent/knowledge/index.md` — T2 index update

IAA is mandatory. No class exemptions apply.

## Known Recurring Failure Patterns (Anti-Regression Obligations)

Based on prior session learning_notes and FAIL-ONLY-ONCE registry:

| Pattern | Anti-Regression Obligation | Verification |
|---------|---------------------------|-------------|
| Missing ripple section (A-023) | PREHANDOVER proof must include ## Ripple/Cross-Agent Assessment | HFMC-01 check |
| Stale SCOPE_DECLARATION.md (A-026) | Update SCOPE_DECLARATION.md to match PR diff before IAA | HFMC-02 check |
| Uncommitted artifacts (A-021) | All bundle items committed before IAA invocation | HFMC-03 check |
